category_sources: source_facts.description says Prolog compiler with constraint solving; GNU Prolog manual describes a native Prolog compiler with finite-domain constraint solving.
display_name_sources: GNU Prolog homepage, manual, and Savannah summary use GNU Prolog; source_facts.name is gnu-prolog.
docs_sources: Official GNU Prolog website lists manual formats; gprolog.org manual pages provide the HTML manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU Prolog homepage provides source distributions, and Savannah summary shows only web-page CVS under development tools, so no official source-control project URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Prolog compiler/interpreter tooling; GNU Prolog manual describes WAM compilation and finite-domain constraint solving.
